title: Korak 52

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Statistics Calculator

Enter a list of comma-separated numbers.

The mean of a list of numbers is the average, calculated by taking the sum of all numbers and dividing that by the count of numbers.

Mean:

The median of a list of numbers is the number that appears in the middle of the list, when sorted from least to greatest.

Median:

The mode of a list of numbers is the number that appears most often in the list.

Mode:

The range of a list of numbers is the difference between the largest and smallest numbers in the list.

Range:

The variance of a list of numbers measures how far the values are from the mean, on average.

Variance:

The standard deviation of a list of numbers is the square root of the variance.

Standard Deviation:

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Vaš povratni poziv za reduce treba da ima parametar difference.
Vaš parametar za difference mora biti postavljen na vrednost od el, manja od mean.
Tvoj povratni poziv za reduce mora imati parametar squared.
Tvoj parametar za squared treba da se postavi na vrednost difference sa potencijom od 2.
Vaš povratni poziv reduce treba da vrati vrednost acc dodatu sa squared.
Ne smete da uklonite početnu vrednost 0 iz vašeg puta/načina .reduce().

description: U vašem povratnom pozivu od .reduce() sa ničim, deklarisati parametar difference i postaviti mu vrednost na el manje mean. Zatim deklarisati parametar squared, i postaviti mu vrednost na difference sa moći od 2. Na kraju, vratiti vrednost acc sumirano sa squared.
